# Extracao: ZASR Account Template Import

- **Fonte:** ZASR Account Template Import.xlsx
- **Tipo:** XLSX
- **Tamanho:** 0.01 MB
- **Info:** {"sheetCount":2}

---

## Aba: READ ME

| HOW TO USE |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1. Follow the training video on how to use this |  |  |
| 2. Follow the config options below |  |  |
| 3. Copy and paste the import tab as instructed |  |  |
|  |  |  |
| CONFIG |  |  |
| a) make a copy of this sheet and store locally so you can edit |  |  |
| b) change the settings below as required |  |  |
|  |  |  |
| Country | DE | (change to another country or WW for Worldwide) |
| Top level name | Ecom | (you can optionally change this to suit eg LeadGen, MAI or your category or business name etc) |
